creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Same here. I've tried with USE_GCC=13 and also 14. Depending on the combination different failures show up. My last test was with 14:

FAILED: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/audacity/work/audacity-Audacity-3.4.2/libraries/lib-theme-resources/LightThemeAsCeeCode.h 
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/audacity/work/.build/libraries/lib-theme-resources && /wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/audacity/work/.build/Release/bin/image-compiler /wrkd
irs/usr/ports/audio/audacity/work/audacity-Audacity-3.4.2/libraries/lib-theme-resources light
